mapper.select: SELECT da.*, d.dormitory_number, d.dormitory_type, d.building FROM dormitory_allocation da LEFT JOIN dormitory d ON da.dormitory_id = d.id WHERE da.id = #{id}

SELECT da.*, d.dormitory_number, d.dormitory_type, d.building FROM dormitory_allocation da LEFT JOIN dormitory d ON da.dormitory_id = d.id WHERE da.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY da.allocate_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT da.*, d.dormitory_number, d.dormitory_type, d.building FROM dormitory_allocation da LEFT JOIN dormitory d ON da.dormitory_id = d.id WHERE da.dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId}
SELECT da.*, d.dormitory_number, d.dormitory_type, d.building FROM dormitory_allocation da LEFT JOIN dormitory d ON da.dormitory_id = d.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dormitory_allocation (student_id, dormitory_id, allocate_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{dormitoryId}, #{allocateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT student_id FROM dormitory_allocation)

SELECT da.*, d.dormitory_number, d.dormitory_type, d.building, s.name AS student_name FROM dormitory_allocation da LEFT JOIN dormitory d ON da.dormitory_id = d.id LEFT JOIN student s ON da.student_id = s.id ORDER BY da.allocate_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
